title: Purely Creamy American Cucumber Salad
description: A refreshing and creamy American salad featuring cucumber, this dish is a crowd-pleaser and perfect for any occasion, with a macrobiotic-friendly twist by using natural ingredients and a deglazing process to enhance flavors.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the yogurt, mayonnaise, dill, chives, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Add the sliced cucumber to the bowl and toss to coat with the yogurt mixture.
In a small pan, deglaze with lemon juice over low heat, scraping the bottom to release any browned bits.
Pour the deglazed lemon juice over the cucumber mixture and toss to combine.
Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good stir and adjust the seasoning if necessary.
Serve the salad cold, garnished with additional chopped fresh dill if desired.
Cover and refrigerate any leftovers for up to 24 hours.
